subject: Emolga — small flying squirrel-like electric creature with white body, black cape-like membranes, and yellow cheek patches. Gliding through stormy skies.
description: A small, round creature glides through the air with wide cape-like wing membranes spread outward. The body is white and round, with black membrane flaps extending from both sides. Yellow cheek markings are visible on the face. The background shows a dramatic sky with electric discharge or lightning effects and cloudy atmosphere. The creature is mid-glide, facing slightly forward.
foreground: small round white creature gliding with black wing membranes spread wide
background: dramatic stormy sky, electric discharge effects
